contatti.label: Contact
contatti.intro: Need help? Reach us through one of our channels or fill out the form below: we reply within 24 business hours.

form.messaggioPlaceholder: Describe the problem or question you'd like to ask…

inviato.title: Request sent
inviato.desc: Thanks, our support team will reply by email within 24 business hours.

businessPlan.q: How do I create my first Business Plan?
businessPlan.a: Go to "Business Plan" and follow the guided 6-step wizard: initial setup, revenue, staff, operating costs, investments and financing. In a few minutes you'll get a complete three-year projection with dashboard and KPIs.

aiCopilot.q: What is the AI Copilot for and how do I use it?
aiCopilot.a: The Copilot ("Virtual CFO") simulates what-if scenarios: price increases, new hires or cost cuts. Open it from the AI button in the top bar or with Ctrl+K, type your question and the plan updates showing the impact on revenue, EBITDA, profit and cash runway. You can always go back to the original figures with "Reset".

datiSalvati.q: Where are my plans saved and how do I find them again?
datiSalvati.a: Every saved plan appears in the "Saved Plans" section with its date, key KPIs and a sustainability indicator. From there you can reopen it to keep working or delete it. Auto-save, when enabled in settings, records changes as you work.

coWork.q: How do I invite my team to collaborate on a plan?
coWork.a: In the "Co-Work" section you can invite colleagues by email choosing their role (Reader or Editor), or generate a shareable invite link that expires after 2 hours. You'll see who has accepted and who is still pending, and you can manage or remove team members at any time.

exportPdf.q: How do I export my plan as a PDF?
exportPdf.a: Open the plan's report or dashboard and click "Export PDF" in the top bar: the view automatically prepares for printing and you can save it as a PDF from your browser's print dialog.

importazione.q: Can I import a Business Plan I already wrote elsewhere?
importazione.a: Yes, in the "Uploads" section you can drag and drop or pick a PDF, DOC, DOCX or .bxp file (up to 50MB): the system analyzes it, extracts the financial data and converts it into the Businext Plan format, showing you the progress step by step.

landing.label: Official website
landing.intro: Discover all Businext Plan Business Plan features, pricing and testimonials on the official landing page.

agenti.title: AI Agents
agenti.desc: Select a specialized agent to explore, analyze, or learn more about your Business Plan.
agenti.noPlanWarn: Agents have more context when a Business Plan is active.

elio.name: Elio
elio.desc: Simulate future scenarios: what happens if you change prices, volumes, or costs? Elio regenerates the plan and compares projections.
elio.example: What happens if I raise the price to €59 from Q2?

argon.name: Argon
argon.desc: Identify inconsistencies, gaps, and risks in your Business Plan. Argon flags anything that may not add up.
argon.example: Are there issues in my revenue data?

xeno.name: Xeno
xeno.desc: Explains financial terminology, tax definitions, and app fields with concrete examples from your plan.
xeno.example: What is IRPEF and how does it affect my plan?

elio.welcome:
Hi! I'm Elio.

Tell me what to change in the plan and I'll show how projections shift.
elio.s1: What if I raise the price to €59 from Q2?
elio.s3: Projection with +30% volume in the UK market
elio.mockReply:
I've updated the Business Plan with the requested scenario.

• Revenue → €{{fatturato}} (+18%)
• EBITDA → €{{ebitda}} (+15%)
• Net Income → €{{utileNetto}} (+22%)
• Cash Runway → {{cashRunway}} months (+4)

The chart is updated in green. Want to explore more scenarios?

argon.placeholder: Ask me to analyze the plan...
argon.welcome:
Hi. I'm Argon.

I scan the Business Plan to identify inconsistencies, risks, and anomalous data.
argon.s1: Are there issues in my revenue data?
argon.s3: What are the main risks in my plan?
argon.mockReply:
I analyzed the Business Plan. Found 2 issues.

🔴 Revenue growth uses an exponential compound formula, not linear. At the current rate, revenue triples unrealistically by year three.

🟠 IRAP is calculated on profit (EBT). The correct base is net production value, which includes labor costs.

Would you like to explore one of these points?

xeno.placeholder: Ask for a definition or explanation...
xeno.welcome:
Hi! I'm Xeno.

I'm here to explain any financial or tax term: IRPEF, EBITDA, TFR, depreciation.
